title: Keto Avocado Tacos
description: A low-carb twist on traditional tacos, featuring avocado and tsmooth cheese. Perfect for a keto diet.
instructions: 2. Cut the tsmooth cheese into small squares and place on a baking sheet.
3. Bake the cheese for 10-12 minutes, or until melted and slightly browned.
4. Meanwhile, slice the avocado into thin pieces.
5. Wash and dry the tart lettuce, then chop it into small pieces.
6. In a small bowl, mix together the mexican seasoning and salt.
7. Assemble the tacos by placing a square of melted cheese onto a lettuce leaf, followed by a few slices of avocado.
8. Sprinkle the mexican seasoning mixture over the top of the avocado.
